For orders on office objections 2, Eg عقا 9 9قع Case Applicant Ali Nawaz alias Faqir Hakim Ali present in person Impugned in tnis criminal revision application ٦٨٥ orJer ٥٥١٤٥ 17,12,2019 whereby the learned Additional Sessions Judge II Kamber dismissed Direct Complaint No 02IZOT9 filed by the applicanit, in terms of Section 203, Cr P C Brielly stated the facts as narrated in the complaint are that the applicant is Sajjaoah Nasheen of Suff Wariyal Faqir Abro situated in Village Ditta Abro and on D704 2013 some followers came ٦١ ٦٥m a5 9uests wlih vhom he was chitchatting In his when at about 12.00 noon the proposed accused along W١٧٨ some ٧٨ ٧٨٨٨٥ persons duly armed with deadly weapons assaulted in order to murder ٨١٨ but they could not succeed In their Intention due to his closing the outer door of the Otaqi however the proposed accused made aerial firing, used ffilthy language The incident was reported to the police through mobile pnone ٥٨٥ seeing the police party coming t٨٤ proposed accusen ran atay Irom ine scere The applicant who present In Derson submits that earlier the direct complaint filed by him was cismissed by the learned Sessions Judge, Kamber Shahdadkot at Karnber vide order dated 23.12.2013; that thereafter he fled criminal miscellaneous application as WLlI us crimninal revision application before this Court but the same were not pressed by his Counsel uithout his knowledge and then he again flled direc 9دب0

For orders on office objections 2, Eg عقا 9 9قع Case Applicant Ali Nawaz alias Faqir Hakim Ali present in person Impugned in tnis criminal revision application ٦٨٥ orJer ٥٥١٤٥ 17,12,2019 whereby the learned Additional Sessions Judge II Kamber dismissed Direct Complaint No 02IZOT9 filed by the applicanit, in terms of Section 203, Cr P C Brielly stated the facts as narrated in the complaint are that the applicant is Sajjaoah Nasheen of Suff Wariyal Faqir Abro situated in Village Ditta Abro and on D704 2013 some followers came ٦١ ٦٥m a5 9uests wlih vhom he was chitchatting In his when at about 12.00 noon the proposed accused along W١٧٨ some ٧٨ ٧٨٨٨٥ persons duly armed with deadly weapons assaulted in order to murder ٨١٨ but they could not succeed In their Intention due to his closing the outer door of the Otaqi however the proposed accused made aerial firing, used ffilthy language The incident was reported to the police through mobile pnone ٥٨٥ seeing the police party coming t٨٤ proposed accusen ran atay Irom ine scere The applicant who present In Derson submits that earlier the direct complaint filed by him was cismissed by the learned Sessions Judge, Kamber Shahdadkot at Karnber vide order dated 23.12.2013; that thereafter he fled criminal miscellaneous application as WLlI us crimninal revision application before this Court but the same were not pressed by his Counsel uithout his knowledge and then he again flled direc 9دب0 Acv4٧٤ ٥٦ ٧٧ >د٠ا ٦ اددن. ٢L direct complaint before tne learned Sessions Judge, Kamnber wnich was transferred to the learned 1 Additional Sessions Judge Kamber for its disposal, but the same was dismissed by the Court for nonprosecution vide order dated 17,02,2018 and was thereafter he filed instant direct complaint He submits that he wvas able I٥ Inake UUI case f٥r taking cognizance bUt the earned trial Court has rejected his direct complaint without assigning any cogent reason It appears from the record that the learned trial Court after recording statement of applicant under Section 200 Cr.PC sent ihe complaint to Judicial Magistrate I, Kamber for preliminary enquiry who afler recorulng statement of PW Muneer Ahmed under Section 202 Cr P C returned the complaint with his report further appears that the earned Additional Sessions Judge-ll Kamber observed the facts that as per applicant the proposed accused entered into his Otaq anid fired Lpon him but no ffire shot hit him and he then closed the door of the ٥٨٥ Inad٤ phone call I٥ Ihe police regarding the incident The fact narraled by the applicant does not appea to prudent mind as to how after firing of tne accused persons the applicant was able to close the door of Dresence I٨٥ acCUSC٥ DerSOns ٧٨٥ were ٥٢١٨٤٥ wvith deadly weapons The learned Judge has also observed the fact that prior to this complaint tne applicant had also ffiled two other complaints 0٧t 0{ ٧٨١٤٨ ٥ne was dismissed non prosecution the ١٤a٢٨e٥ Additional Sessions Judge, Kamber, while the other one was dismissed by the learned Sessions Judge Kamber Shahdadkot ai Kamber merits under Section 203, CrP C It may be observed here that the alleged incidenit is shown to have occurred on O704 2O13 ie about 07 years ago and earlier Iwo 0!30 0!39 n."0.5-05/011020/د40 crimi٨al complaints fled th٤ applicant ٧٧٤٢٤ dismissed Ihe assessment of material made by the learned trial Court as to the facts of Ihe case appeals to tne reason therefore, aIn of the view that no sufficient material priima facie available on the record for proceeding with the matter hence tne learned trial Court has rightly rejected the complaint For the foregoing facts and reasons the impugned order passed by the leamned trial Court does not suffer from any Illegality or Irregularity requiring inlerference this Count ٧٨٥e٢ revisional jurisdiction, hence this criminal revision application
